title: erigeron uniflorus subsp. eriocephalus
intro: Erigeron uniflorus subsp. eriocephalus, also known as the white fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The white fleabane is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
